name: io.github.dataplat/dbatools-mcp-server
description: MCP server for dbatools — exposes SQL Server management commands as MCP tools

environmentVariables.name: DBATOOLS_SAFE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' to allow write/destructive dbatools operations. Defaults to true (read-only safe mode).

environmentVariables.name: MAX_OUTPUT_ROWS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum number of rows returned per command. Defaults to 100. Allowed range: 1–10000.

environmentVariables.name: COMMAND_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
environmentVariables.description: Timeout in seconds for each dbatools command. Defaults to 60. Allowed range: 5–3600.

environmentVariables.name: PWSH_EXE
environmentVariables.description: Path to the PowerShell executable. Defaults to 'pwsh'.
